Documentation développeur
computeError.cc
1 #include "computeError.h"
2 #include <arcane/IMeshSubMeshTransition.h>
3 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/BCs/BoundaryConditionTypes.h"
4 
5 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
6 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
7 
8 Real computeLpErrorNorm(const VariableCellReal& uh,
9  const CellGroup& cells,
10  const IGeometryMng::Real3GroupMap& c_centers,
11  const IGeometryMng::RealGroupMap& c_measures,
12  IFunctionR4vR1* u,
13  Real p,
14  Real t) {
15 
16  Real errp = 0.;
17  ENUMERATE_CELL(iT, cells) {
18  const Cell& T = *iT;
19  const Real3& C_T = c_centers[T];
20  Real meas_T = c_measures[T];
21  Real uh_T = uh[T];
22  Real u_T = u->eval(C_T.x,C_T.y,C_T.z, t);
23 
24  errp = errp + meas_T * pow(math::abs(u_T - uh_T), p);
25  }
26  Real err = pow(errp, 1/p);
27  return err;
28 }
29 
30 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
31 
32 Real computeLpErrorNormPowerp(const VariableCellReal& uh,
33  const CellGroup& cells,
34  const IGeometryMng::Real3GroupMap& c_centers,
35  const IGeometryMng::RealGroupMap& c_measures,
36  IFunctionR4vR1* u,
37  Real p,
38  Real t) {
39 
40  Real errp = 0.;
41  ENUMERATE_CELL(iT, cells) {
42  const Cell& T = *iT;
43  const Real3& C_T = c_centers[T];
44  Real meas_T = c_measures[T];
45  Real uh_T = uh[T];
46  Real u_T = u->eval(C_T.x,C_T.y,C_T.z, t);
47 
48  errp = errp + meas_T * pow(math::abs(u_T - uh_T), p);
49  }
50 
51  return errp;
52 }
53 
54 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
55 
56 Real2 computeFluxErrors(const FaceGroup& faces,
57  const CellGroup& cells,
58  const FaceGroup& boundary_faces,
59  const VariableCellReal& uh,
60  const PartialVariableFaceReal& uhb,
61  const IGeometryMng::RealGroupMap& f_measures,
62  const IGeometryMng::Real3GroupMap& f_centers,
63  const IGeometryMng::Real3GroupMap& f_normals,
64  const IGeometryMng::RealGroupMap& c_measures,
65  const VariableCellReal3x3& k,
66  IMesh* mesh,
67  IBoundaryConditionMng* m_bc_mng,
68  boost::shared_ptr<CoefficientArrayT<Cell> > m_cell_coefficients,
69  boost::shared_ptr<CoefficientArrayT<Face> > m_face_coefficients,
70  IFunctionR4vR1* grad_x,
71  IFunctionR4vR1* grad_y,
72  IFunctionR4vR1* grad_z,
73  Real t)
74 {
75  Real2 FluxErrors;
76  Real erFl2 = 0.;
77  Real erinf = 0.;
78 
79  // variables for the normalization of the flux
80  Real normInf = 0.;
81  Real normL2 = 0.;
82 
83  // Get the boundary face unknowns
84  Integer MaxFaceId = boundary_faces.mesh()->faceFamily()->maxLocalId();
85  SharedArray<Real> u_boun(MaxFaceId);
86  const FaceGroup& non_dirichlet_faces = uhb.itemGroup();
87 
88  VariableBuildInfo vb(mesh , "BoundaryValues", IVariable::PNoRestore);
89 
90  VariableFaceReal u_b(vb);
91  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, non_dirichlet_faces){
92  const Face & face = *iface;
93  u_b[face] = uhb[iface];
94  }
95  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, boundary_faces.own()){
96  const Face & F = *iface;
97  IBoundaryCondition* bc_F = m_bc_mng->getBoundaryCondition(F);
98  if (bc_F->getType() == BoundaryConditionTypes::Dirichlet ){
99  const Real3& C_F = f_centers[F];
100  u_b[F] = bc_F->eval(C_F, t);
101  }
102  }
103  u_b.synchronize();
104 
105  SharedArray<Real> local_error(MaxFaceId);
106  SharedArray<Real> local_norm(MaxFaceId);
107 
108  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, faces){
109  const Face & F = *iface;
110 // Calculate the flux density approximation
111  Integer c_st_size = m_cell_coefficients->stencilSize(F);
112  ItemVectorView c_stencilF = m_cell_coefficients->stencil(F);
113  ArrayView<Real> c_coeffF = m_cell_coefficients->coefficients(F);
114  Real flux_approx = 0.;
115 
116  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < c_st_size ; i++){
117  const Cell& cell = c_stencilF[i].toCell();
118  flux_approx += c_coeffF[i] * uh[cell];
119  }
120  Integer f_st_size = m_face_coefficients->stencilSize(F);
121  if (f_st_size){
122  ArrayView<Real> f_coeffF = m_face_coefficients->coefficients(F);
123  ItemVectorView f_stencilF = m_face_coefficients->stencil(F);
124  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < f_st_size ; i++)
125  flux_approx += f_coeffF[i] * u_b[f_stencilF[i].toFace() ];
126  }
127  flux_approx /= f_measures[F]; // get the flux density
128 // Calculate the exact flux density
129  Real3 normal = f_normals[F]/f_measures[F];
130  Real3x3 Lambda;
131  if (F.isSubDomainBoundary()){
132  const Cell & cell = F.boundaryCell();
133  Lambda = k[cell];
134  if (!F.isSubDomainBoundaryOutside())
135  normal = -normal;
136  }
137  else{
138  const Cell & cell = F.backCell();
139  Lambda = k[cell];
140  }
141  Real3 kn = math::prodTensVec(Lambda, normal);
142  Real3 grad;
143  grad.x = FaceAverage(mesh, F, grad_x);
144  grad.y = FaceAverage(mesh, F, grad_y);
145  grad.z = FaceAverage(mesh, F, grad_z);
146  Real flux_exact = -math::scaMul(grad,kn);
147 // Calculate the local error
148  local_error[F.localId()] = flux_exact-flux_approx;
149 // Normalization data
150  local_norm[F.localId()] = math::abs(flux_exact);
151  }
152 
153  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, faces.own()){
154  const Face & F = *iface;
155  erinf = math::max(erinf , math::abs(local_error[F.localId()]));
156  normInf = math::max(normInf , local_norm[F.localId()]);
157  }
158 
159  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,cells.own()){
160  const Cell& cell = *icell;
161  Real cell_error2 = 0.;
162  Real cell_norm2 = 0.;
163  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,cell.faces()){
164  const Face & face = *iface;
165  cell_error2 += local_error[face.localId()] * local_error[face.localId()];
166  cell_norm2 += local_norm[face.localId()] * local_norm[face.localId()];
167  }
168  cell_error2 *= c_measures[cell];
169  cell_norm2 *= c_measures[cell];
170  erFl2 += cell_error2;
171  normL2 += cell_norm2;
172  }
173 
174  Real erinf_glob = cells.mesh()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceMax, erinf);
175  Real erFl2_glob = cells.mesh()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum, erFl2);
176  Real normInf_glob = cells.mesh()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceMax, normInf);
177  Real normL2_glob = cells.mesh()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum, normL2);
178 
179  FluxErrors.x = erinf_glob/normInf_glob;
180  FluxErrors.y = math::sqrt(erFl2_glob/normL2_glob); // here the L2 error is squared
181 
182  return FluxErrors;
183 }
184 
185 Real FaceAverage(IMesh* mesh, const Face& face,
186  IFunctionR4vR1* u, Real t)
187 {
188  SharedArray<Real3> x(3);
189  VariableNodeReal3 coords = PRIMARYMESH_CAST(mesh)->nodesCoordinates();
190  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < 3 ; i++)
191  x[i] = coords[face.node(i)];
192 
193  SharedArray2<Real> a(3,3); //baricentric points
194  SharedArray<Real> w(4); //weights of the quadrature
195  SharedArray<Real3> xG(13); //Gauss integration points (1+3+3+6)
196 
197  w[0] = -0.149570044467670;
198  w[1] = 0.175615257433204;
199  w[2] = 0.053347235608839;
200  w[3] = 0.077113760890257;
201 
202  a[0][0] = 0.479308067841923;
203  a[0][1] = 0.260345966079038;
204  a[0][2] = a[1][1];
205 
206  a[1][0] = 0.869739794195568;
207  a[1][1] = 0.065130102902216;
208  a[1][2] = a[2][1];
209 
210  a[2][0] = 0.638444188569809;
211  a[2][1] = 0.312865496004875;
212  a[2][2] = 0.048690315425316;
213 
214 // compute the Gauss points
215  xG[0] = 0.;
216  for (Integer i = 0 ; i < 3; i++)
217  xG[0] += x[i];
218  xG[0] *= 0.3333333333333333333333;
219 
220  Real3 x10 = x[1] - x[0];
221  Real3 x20 = x[2] - x[0];
222 
223  for (Integer i = 0; i < 3; i++)
224  xG[i+1] = x[0] + x10 * a[0][i] + x20 * a[0][(i+1)%3] ;
225 
226  for (Integer i = 0; i < 3; i++)
227  xG[i+4] = x[0] + x10 * a[1][i] + x20 * a[1][(i+1)%3] ;
228 
229  for (Integer i = 0; i < 3; i++){
230  xG[i+7] = x[0] + x10 * a[2][i] + x20 * a[2][(i+1)%3] ;
231  xG[i+10] = x[0] + x10 * a[2][(i+1)%3] + x20 * a[2][i] ;
232  }
233 
234  Real average = 0.;
235  average += w[0] * u->eval(xG[0].x,xG[0].y,xG[0].z, t);
236  Real sum = 0.;
237  for (Integer i = 1 ; i <= 3; i++ )
238  sum += u->eval(xG[i].x,xG[i].y,xG[i].z,t);
239  average += w[1] * sum;
240  sum = 0.;
241  for (Integer i = 4 ; i <= 6; i++ )
242  sum += u->eval(xG[i].x,xG[i].y,xG[i].z,t);
243  average += w[2] * sum;
244  sum = 0.;
245  for (Integer i = 7 ; i <= 12; i++ )
246  sum += u->eval(xG[i].x,xG[i].y,xG[i].z,t);
247  average += w[3] * sum;
248  return average;
249 }
250

252 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

virtual Real eval(const Real3 &x=Real3(0, 0, 0), Real t=0)=0
Evaluate boundary condition.
IBoundaryCondition::getType

Return boundary condition type.

IFunctionR4vR1::eval
virtual void eval(const Arcane::Real &var0, const Arcane::Real &var1, const Arcane::Real &var2, const Arcane::Real &var3, Arcane::Real &res0)=0
Point-wise evaluation.
ItemGroupMapBaseT
Classe de base pour les ItemGroupMap.
Definition: ItemGroupMap.h:296
BoundaryConditionTypes::Dirichlet
@ Dirichlet
Inflow boundary condition.
Definition: BoundaryConditionTypes.h:14
